summary: P0 Multi-impacts bug fix verified. Backend: 18/18 tests passed (100%). Frontend: GuidedEntryModal correctly displays multi-impacts with GHG Protocol business rules. All 3 test scenarios pass: (1) Scope 1 entry → creates scope1 + scope3_3, (2) Scope 2 entry → creates scope2 + scope3_3, (3) Scope 3 entry → creates scope3 only. scope3_3 activities correctly assigned to category 'activites_combustibles_energie'.
critical_code_review_comments: Code review passed: normalize_scope() correctly handles scope3_3 normalization without converting scope3_amont
apply_business_rules() correctly filters impacts based on entry scope and category
create_activity_for_impact() correctly assigns category_id='activites_combustibles_energie' for scope3_3 impacts
Frontend GuidedEntryModal correctly mirrors backend business rules for multi-impacts display

success_rate.backend: 100% (18/18 tests passed - 9 from test_multi_impacts.py + 9 from test_ghg_protocol_rules.py)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (multi-impacts display working correctly with business rules)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-impacts P0 bug fix fully verified. Test files cover all GHG Protocol business rules. Key factors tested: Chaudière mazout (698418f3c1a4e9f26cd2735f), Gaz naturel (698418f3c1a4e9f26cd2715d), Scooter EURO-5 (698418f3c1a4e9f26cd27385).

scope1_entry_chaudiere_mazout.description: Creates 2 activities (scope1 + scope3_3) for Chaudière mazout factor
scope1_entry_chaudiere_mazout.business_rule: Scope 1 entry → include scope1, scope2, scope3_3 impacts

scope2_entry_gaz_naturel.description: Creates 2 activities (scope2 + scope3_3) for Gaz naturel factor
scope2_entry_gaz_naturel.business_rule: Scope 2 entry → include scope1, scope2, scope3_3 impacts

scope3_entry_scooter.description: Creates 1 activity (scope3 only) for Scooter EURO-5 factor
scope3_entry_scooter.business_rule: Scope 3 entry → include only scope3 impacts

zero_value_exclusion.description: Scooter scope2=0 is correctly excluded from activity creation

GET /api/activities?category_id=activite.description: scope3_3 activities appear when filtering by category

GuidedEntryModal.multi_impacts_display: PASS - Shows all impacts from factor with scope labels and color coding
GuidedEntryModal.business_rules_indicator: PASS - Shows 'Règle métier appliquée (X impact(s) exclu(s))' when impacts are filtered
GuidedEntryModal.emissions_calculation: PASS - Correctly calculates emissions for each included impact
GuidedEntryModal.scope1_entry_display: PASS - Shows Scope 1 + Scope 3.3 impacts for Scope 1 entry
GuidedEntryModal.scope3_entry_display: PASS - Shows only Scope 3 impact for Scope 3 entry

bug_fix_verification.original_issue: Multi-impacts logic not working correctly - scope3_3 activities not appearing in correct category
bug_fix_verification.root_cause_2: scope3_3 activities were not assigned to 'activites_combustibles_energie' category
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied_2: Added logic in create_activity_for_impact() to set category_id='activites_combustibles_energie' for scope3_3 impacts
